summaryTemplate: {{className}} is the {{patternRole}}. It captures its state into a memento and restores from one later, enabling undo and checkpoints without exposing private fields. Pattern body lives at {{file}}:{{lineStart}}-{{lineEnd}}.
chosenRationaleTemplate: Tagged as Memento because {{className}} exposes a save/restore method pair (lines {{lineStart}}-{{lineEnd}}) — the snapshot-and-rollback shape that keeps state encapsulated.

memento_save_restore_method.note: The save/restore operation. This is the undo seam: state leaves and re-enters the object only through here, so encapsulation holds.

runnerUpComparisonTemplates.Prototype: Prototype clones a whole live object to get another usable instance. Memento captures opaque state purely to restore the same object later — the snapshot is not meant to be used as an object.
